title: Isle of Berk (Across the Archipelago)
description: HTTYD in Minecraft! Enjoy a Modpack filled with Dragons, HTTYD references and archipelago terrain. Built to emulate the HTTYD movies in Minecraft!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Isle_of_Berk_Across_the_Archipelago/BH_Isle_of_Berk_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Isle_of_Berk_Across_the_Archipelago/BH_Isle_of_Berk_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Isle_of_Berk_Across_the_Archipelago/BH_Isle_of_Berk_overview.webp)
---
**Across the Archipelag**o aims to bring the realism of HTTYD into Minecraft. With more water than land, enjoy exploring across the archipelago. Travel between islands and continents to tame the dragon of your dreams. Soar through the skies dragon rider! Structures exist both on land and at sea, but will you risk the waves to obtain these new treasures.

Dragons and dungeons what more could you ask for. Find powerful weapons, grow and harvest over 50 different food types and pillage villages full of goodies. Settle up high on the peaks of a volcanic mountain or choose to live lavishly on the ship of dragon hunters. Drink all the ale you can, until your heart is content!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/across-the-archipelago)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/across-the-archipelago)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/6Vc7TI6ZCvw?si=iTwliDtFZPOpl1Zp" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Isle_of_Berk_Across_the_Archipelago/BH_Isle_of_Berk_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Dungeons** - Feeling adventurous? Time to tackle a complex dungeon going from its peak to its deepest depths.
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Jump from island to island looking for the dragons of your dreams, but the waters also contain mystery.
- [✔️] **Vikings Nd More** - What's this? You've found a viking ship and a viking village what more could this wonderful world have in store for you.
- [✔️] **Dragons** - The wildlife can be a bit treacherous but don't worry these flying lizards prefer a larger lunch, with over 50+ different species and over 1k+ variants, can you tame the smallest to largest of these magnificant creatures.
- **And so much more...!**

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Isle_of_Berk_Across_the_Archipelago/BH_Isle_of_Berk_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
